summary: The user is planning a trip to the grocery store to try new healthy recipes, specifically focusing on chicken breast dishes and healthy snacks. They express a desire to incorporate new spices and seasonings into their cooking and are also interested in baked salmon recipes with healthy marinades and seasonings.
facts: The user is planning a trip to the grocery store this weekend to try new healthy recipes using chicken breast. The user is considering making Grilled Chicken Fajitas and Chicken and Mango Salad for dinner. The user is making a conscious effort to snack healthier by keeping nuts and dried fruit on their desk at work and limiting weekend snacks to fruit and cheese plates. The user is excited to try protein balls and trail mix bars as additions to their snack routine. The user has been cooking at home more often and packing their lunch for work as part of their effort to eat healthier. The user is interested in trying new spices and seasonings to add flavor to their meals, particularly with chicken and vegetables. The user is looking for healthy seasonings or marinades for baked salmon recipes.
